extension.summary: Genesis - Stream Movies and TV Shows
extension.description: Genesis - Your ultimate streaming addon for Movies and TV Shows with torrent support. Features Meteor, Streamthru, Torz, and Webstreamr scrapers. Fully compatible with Kodi 21 Omega.
extension.disclaimer: The author does not host or distribute any of the content displayed by this addon. The author does not have any affiliation with the content provider.
